---
title: "Classroom files"
author: "Dr. Bartosiak"
---

Here you will find files used in the classroom examples.

## Basics

[Excel 1](/_files/class/1.xlsx){target="_blank"}

## Statistical Analysis


## Data visualization



------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.disclaimer {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #666;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding-top: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div>
  {{< include footer.html >}}
</div>
```
